description: Phase 1a evaluation queries — runner executes actual retrieval + generation. NOT a labeled golden dataset (that is Phase 1b #318).
note: Reference-free metrics only. No nDCG, MRR, or Precision@K claims. Contexts and responses are produced by the system under test, not pre-baked.

samples.user_input: What chunking strategies does the knowledge system support?
How does document deduplication work during ingestion?
What authentication methods are used for knowledge routes?
What is the maximum context token budget for knowledge injection?
How does the bot-scope binding work at runtime?
